findings.issue: All 10 PLang test goals remain stubs. Blocked on builder prompt update. Tracked separately.
findings.impact: No builder pipeline validation. Not blocking for this review cycle.
findings.suggestion: Implement when builder prompt supports identity module.

summary: All 1649 C# tests pass. All major findings from v1-v3 have been fixed: export default path tested, weak assertions strengthened, flaky test fixed (JSON deserialization), auto-create overwrite bug fixed (promotion instead of overwrite). New tests are honest — deletion test confirms they would fail if fixes were reverted. Only remaining item is PLang test stubs (blocked on builder, tracked separately). Identity module test suite is approved.
